description: Ran tutorials and supported teaching for the master's introduction to computational science — modelling, simulation and scientific computing — for incoming students.
Computer labs, tutorials and the practical project for a bachelor's data-analysis course, teaching students to work with real data in Python.
Co-ran the master's research seminar series, guiding students through reading, presenting and discussing current computational-science research.
Weekly tutorials and assignment feedback for system-dynamics modelling, working primarily with Vensim and AnyLogic.
Lab tutorials for a first-year statistics course (teaching R) and tutorials for an introductory probability module for mathematics students.
